mapper.select: SELECT sr.id, sr.order_id, sr.order_item_id, sr.product_id, sr.product_name, sr.quantity, sr.status, CASE sr.status WHEN 0 THEN '预占中' WHEN 1 THEN '已释放' WHEN 2 THEN '已扣减' END AS status_desc, sr.expire_time, sr.release_reason, sr.created_time, sr.updated_time FROM stock_reservation sr WHERE sr.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY sr.created_time DESC

SELECT id, order_id, order_item_id, product_id, product_name, quantity, status, expire_time, release_reason, created_time, updated_time FROM stock_reservation WHERE status = 0 AND expire_time <= #{now}
